creator: frankch@waru.life.nthu.edu.tw
text:
Aview is a graphics viewer which utilize devel/aalib (should be
 	graphics/aalib). It display graphics using ascii texts. This
	version works under X and slang (using libslang).
	Committers: please note the dependancies, I make it depend on
	devel/aalib, you may have to change it to graphics/aalib according
	to the aalib category state. Right now aalib is still in devel
	category. Should I make another send-pr to promote the devel/aalib
	toward graphics/aalib change?

Fix: 

The port tarball in in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming
	with the file name aview-port.tar.gz.
